name: Can my boss fire me for filing a warehouse injury claim in West Valley City?
description: Illegal retaliation; report to labor dept.[1]

mainEntity.name: Can my boss fire me for filing a warehouse injury claim in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Illegal retaliation; report to labor dept.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, Utah/Idaho law protects against retaliation; it's illegal to terminate for comp claims.** Prove via timing and statements.[1] Key factors: document harassment; file complaint with Labor Commission. Seek unemployment if fired; sue for wrongful termination. Protections are strong.[4]
